title: Telemetry Component Definition
description: A Telemetry WipperSnapper component for use in Adafruit IO. Each telemetry component is a single host/device metric (e.g. rssi, latency_ms, boot_reason) reported as a ws.telemetry.Event.

displayName.description: The human-friendly name of this telemetry metric.

published.description: If true, this component is supported by the current firmware version and will be displayed to all users. If false, it is hidden behind a developer toggle so that contributors can still work on it against the production site.

description.description: A brief description describing this telemetry metric.

vendor.description: Name of the company that makes this component.

telemetryName.description: The telemetry metric name sent in ws.telemetry.Add.name. Must exactly match a firmware telemetry driver's NAME so the device can resolve the metric.

valueKind.description: The value kind this metric reports, matching the firmware telemetry driver's KIND. Floats ride on a T_RAW sensor.Event, byte strings on T_BYTES, and booleans on T_BOOLEAN.

reportOnce.description: When true, this metric is reported a single time when added (period 0) rather than on a periodic cadence. Used for one-shot metrics such as boot_reason.

defaultPeriod.description: Default reporting period in seconds. A positive value schedules periodic reporting; 0 reports a single reading at add time (one-shot). Ignored when reportOnce is true.
